sample_questions: Tell me about an ethical dilemma you faced at work
How do you approach learning through cases?
What will you bring to the Darden community?
red_flags: Not being comfortable with case-based discussion
tips: Darden uses the case method extensively - show you thrive in discussion-based learning.
Ethical leadership is a core pillar - have a genuine example ready.
Be prepared for a structured, professional interview format.
